project: VR&GenAI4YouthDMH - Virtual Reality and Generative Artificial Intelligence as Digital Mental Health Tools for Young People
title: VR&GenAI4YouthDMH - Virtual Reality and Generative Artificial Intelligence as Digital Mental Health Tools for Young People

metadata.program: European Cooperation in Science and Technology (COST)

czech_title.label: Czech title
czech_title.text: Virtualni realita a generativni umela inteligence jako nastroje digitalniho mentalniho zdravi mladych lidi

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project will contribute to the activities of COST Action CA23153 - YouthDMH - in the areas related to using virtual reality, enhanced by wearable technologies, for cognitive behavioural therapy of anxiety disorders among young people, and generative artificial intelligence-based conversational agents for contextual and early assessment of their mental health and wellbeing.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader
